overview: GLM-4.7-Flash is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM Flash line. Released 2026-01-19. Lightweight, low-latency free-tier GLM models for fast everyday tasks.
What's notable in this version: Lightweight free-tier model with competitive coding capability and low latency; open weights on Hugging Face.
